description: Perform a mediation analysis using the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset to test if 'Revise' (study time) mediates the effect of 'Anxiety' on 'Exam' performance. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Mediation_ExamAnxiety.omv. Create a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/mediation_report.txt including the unstandardized coefficients and p-values for the total effect, Path a, Path b, direct effect (c'), and the indirect effect (a * b), followed by a conclusion on whether mediation occurred.
